expectations.text: Restates the problem before proposing anything
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'Если я правильно понял, проблема в том, что форма регистрации сабмитится успешно...'

expectations.text: Asks at least one clarifying question before offering fixes
expectations.evidence: Asks about Network tab to determine if request reaches backend

expectations.text: Does NOT propose a concrete fix/command in the first response
expectations.evidence: No fix proposed — only investigation question

expectations.text: Separates symptom from possible root causes
expectations.evidence: Explicitly lists expected vs actual, then says 'Разрыв между этими двумя точками — это где живёт баг'

expectations.text: Asks ONE question at a time (not a barrage of 3+)
expectations.evidence: Single focused question about Network tab
